data.title: Buenaventura (NYSE: BVN; BUE.LM) to hold Q3 2025 earnings call on October 31, 2025 at 12:00 PM ET (11:00 AM LT). CEO and management team to review financial and operating results.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM) has announced the scheduling of its Third Quarter 2025 earnings conference call. The call is set to take place on Friday, October 31, 2025, at 12:00 PM Eastern Time and 11:00 AM Lima Time. During the call, Leandro García Raggio, the Chief Executive Officer, along with other senior management team members, will review Buenaventura’s Third Quarter 2025 financial and operating results.

data.title: Farmland Partners Inc. will release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 29 after 5pm ET and host conference call on Oct 30 at 11am ET.
data.description: Farmland Partners Inc. (NYSE: FPI) is set to unveil its financial report for the quarter concluded on September 30, 2025, post 5 p.m. (ET) on October 29, 2025. The Company will conduct a conference call on October 30, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) to review the financial outcomes and present a business update. To join the call, dial 1-800-715-9871.

data.title: Nextracker stock rises after strong Q2 results. Q2 Revenue: $905.27M, Adjusted EPS: $1.19. Total revenue up 42% YoY. Backlog over $5B.
data.description: Nextracker Inc's (NASDAQ: NXT) stock is surging in after-hours trading following the release of their impressive second quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company exceeded expectations with Q2 revenue reaching $905.27 million, surpassing estimated $838.62 million, and Q2 Adjusted EPS at $1.19, higher than estimated $1.01. Total revenue for the quarter saw a 42% year-over-year increase. Nextracker also revealed that their backlog now exceeds $5 billion. At the close of the quarter, the company held $845 million in cash and cash equivalents. This report signals a potential breakout for NXT. Check out the full breakdown for more details.

data.title: Imperial Metals reports Q3 2025 at Red Chris Mine with 20.9M lbs copper, 21,660 oz gold. Company's share: 6.27M lbs copper, 6,498 oz gold. Ticker: TSX:III.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 23, 2025, Imperial Metals Corporation announced its quarterly production results from the Red Chris mine in northwest British Columbia. In the third quarter of 2025, the Red Chris mine produced 20.9 million pounds of copper and 21,660 ounces of gold, representing a significant increase from the same period in 2024 when production stood at 18.977 million pounds of copper and 13,414 ounces of gold. Imperial Metals Corporation, owning a 30% stake in the Red Chris mine, reported its share of the Q3 production as 6.27 million pounds of copper and 6,498 ounces of gold.

data.title: Primis Financial Corp. reports Q3 earnings per share of $7 and declares quarterly dividend of $0.10 per share.
data.description: Primis Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FRST) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share on October 23, 2025. The company, along with its subsidiary Primis Bank, disclosed a net income available to common shareholders of $7 million.

data.title: Post Holdings (NYSE: POST) to hold Q4 fiscal year 2025 conference call on Nov 21 at 9:00 a.m. ET. #earnings #stocks
data.description: On October 23, 2025, a global consumer packaged goods holding company, Post Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: POST), disclosed plans to convene a conference call on November 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the call is to delve into the financial outcomes of the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025.

data.title: YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) received a Nasdaq notification about bid price requirement.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH), a prominent player in on-demand workforce solutions and integrated facility management, disclosed that it was informed through a notification letter...

data.title: DAVIDsTEA presents at Toronto's Planet MicroCap Showcase, an event in partnership with MicroCapClub. TSX-Venture: DTEA.
data.description: In Montreal on October 23, 2025, DAVIDsTEA Inc. (TSX-Venture: DTEA), a prominent tea retailer in North America, revealed their participation in the Planet MicroCap Showcase: TORONTO 2025 alongside MicroCapClub.

data.title: AlphaGen plans to raise $2.5 million through private placement.
data.description: A recent report has revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States fell to 4.2% in the month of August, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.4%. The economy added 235,000 jobs in August, surpassing economists' expectations. The job gains were seen across various sectors, including hospitality, professional services, and healthcare. The report also highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 0.6% in August, bringing the total increase over the past year to 4.3%. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening labor market and an improving economic outlook for the country.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services increases quarterly dividend to $0.49 per share for Q3 2025. Payment on Nov 13 to shareholders as of Nov 3.
data.description: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. disclosed today an uptick in their cash dividend to $0.49 per share of common stock for the third quarter of 2025. The new dividend, termed the "Common Stock Dividend," is set to be disbursed on November 13, 2025, to all stockholders enlisted as of November 3, 2025. Mickey McKee, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Kodiak, expressed their optimism regarding this development.

data.title: Robert Half named a top workplace for women in 2025 by Fortune and Forbes, recognized for promoting gender equality.
data.description: A global talent solutions and business consulting company, Robert Half (NYSE: RHI), based in Menlo Park, California, was recently acknowledged by reputable publications. Fortune recognized it as one of the Best Workplaces for Women, while Forbes named it one of the World's Top Companies for Women in 2025. These recognitions highlight the company's efforts in promoting inclusivity and gender equality in the workplace.

data.title: Phillips 66 board members Glenn Tilton and Marna Whittington announce retirement, won't seek re-election.
data.description: Houston-based company Phillips 66 recently disclosed that two of its board members, Glenn Tilton and Marna Whittington, have made plans to retire and will not seek re-election. This decision comes as the company prepares for upcoming changes in its board composition. Phillips 66, known for its diverse portfolio in the energy sector, will see the departure of Tilton and Whittington, signaling a shift in leadership. This move indicates a transition period for the company, with the board aiming to bring in new members to drive future strategies and decisions.

data.title: Q3 2025 saw 378.5M domain name registrations, up by 6.8M (1.8%) from Q2. VeriSign reported via DNIB.com.
data.description: VeriSign, a leading provider of internet infrastructure and domain registry services, revealed in their recent announcement that the third quarter of 2025 concluded with a total of 378.5 million domain name registrations across all top-level domains. This marked a notable increase of 6.8 million domain registrations, representing a growth of 1.8% compared to the previous quarter of 2025. This update was sourced from the latest Domain Name Industry Brief Quarterly Report published by DNIB.com.

data.title: Homebase introduces AI-powered Payroll Assistant to help small businesses manage payroll with confidence, processing $5B in gross payroll since 2022 and catching timecard issues early.
data.description: In San Francisco, Homebase unveiled its Payroll Assistant, utilizing AI technology to simplify payroll preparation. This tool helps identify and resolve timecard discrepancies in advance, empowering small business owners to process payroll accurately. Homebase has processed over 7 million paychecks and $5 billion in gross payroll since 2022. The Payroll Assistant is part of Homebase's AI tool collection aimed at supporting small businesses.

data.title: NanoXplore secures $25 million through private placement deal.
data.description: On Tuesday, it was reported that the global sales of electric vehicles have reached a new record high in the first quarter of 2021, with over 700,000 units sold worldwide. This represents a significant increase of 140% compared to the same period last year. The surge in demand for electric vehicles can be attributed to various factors such as government incentives, a growing awareness of climate change, and the expansion of charging infrastructure. China emerged as the leading market for electric vehicles, accounting for over 50% of total global sales. The United States and Europe also witnessed substantial growth in sales, with a 120% and 90% increase respectively. Analysts predict that this trend is likely to continue as more countries set ambitious targets to phase out traditional internal combustion engine vehicles in the coming years.

data.title: Aecon partnership chosen to build 12 Xe-100 SMRs in Washington State with Energy Northwest, finalizing negotiations.
data.description: In Toronto on October 23, 2025, Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) revealed that Cascade Nuclear Partners, a joint venture including Aecon, Kiewit, and Black & Veatch, is in the final stages of discussions with Energy Northwest. The collaboration aims to finish the design, planning, and construction of the initial four out of 12 Xe-100 small modular reactors (SMR) utilizing a progressive design-build approach.
Lisa McClain, a Congress member, revealed 88 new stock trades including BTI, CHD, WTRG, INGR, BCC.

data.title: Greenbrier declares dividend of $0.32/share, 46th consecutive, payable on Dec 3 to stockholders as of Nov 12.
data.description: In Lake Oswego, Oregon, on October 23, 2025, The Greenbrier Companies (NYSE: GBX) reported a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on December 3, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such by November 12, 2025. This dividend marks Greenbrier's 46th consecutive quarterly distribution.

data.title: CAGE Bio starts clinical trial for vitiligo treatment with topical DNA aptamer therapy CGB-600.
data.description: In San Carlos, California and Dallas, Texas on October 23, 2025, CAGE Bio Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company focusing on innovative immunomodulatory treatments for dermatological conditions, revealed the commencement of a randomized, double-blind, vehicle-controlled clinical trial.

data.title: California Water Service Group named one of "America's Greenest Companies" by Newsweek, only two water utilities honored.
data.description: California Water Service Group has been recognized as one of the top two water utilities in the United States and named among America's Greenest Companies by Newsweek. The company's commitment to environmental sustainability and green initiatives has set them apart, earning them this prestigious accolade. This recognition highlights their efforts to promote eco-friendly practices while providing essential services to customers.
